nodes.name: Ancient Protocols
nodes.effect: All Core Guardian units +1 to all defense rolls
nodes.notes: The oldest systems are still the best systems

nodes.name: Silent Advance
nodes.effect: Core Guardian units cannot be detected by standard Intel actions or scouting units
nodes.notes: They were here before your sensors

nodes.name: Resonance Tuning
nodes.effect: All Core Guardian energy weapons +1 damage. Arc Cannon ignores shields permanently.
nodes.notes: Frequency calibrated over millions of years

nodes.name: Warden Consciousness
nodes.effect: All Core Guardian units share full vision across the entire planet map, regardless of position

nodes.name: Temporal Calibration
nodes.effect: Stasis Sphere duration +1 cycle, recharge time -1 cycle

nodes.name: Null-Field Expansion
nodes.effect: Dimensional Anchor radius +1 hex, duration +1 cycle

nodes.name: Temporal Reserves
nodes.effect: When a Core Guardian unit would be destroyed, 15% chance it is instead frozen for 1 cycle and returns at 1 HP

nodes.name: The Unbreakable Law
nodes.effect: Unlock: once per game, negate any single enemy ability, attack, or event entirely. No resistance roll. No partial effect.
nodes.notes: What the Guardians forbid does not happen.

nodes.name: Nexus Efficiency
nodes.effect: Nexus-Colossus unit cost -15% scrap. Deploy time -1 cycle.
nodes.notes: The largest weapons are the oldest

nodes.name: Celestial Judgment
nodes.effect: Celestial-Throne flagship special ability cooldown -2 cycles
nodes.notes: Judgment falls faster when it must

nodes.name: Ascendant Form
nodes.effect: Nexus-Colossus base HP +50%. Gains Regeneration: heals 2 HP per cycle out of combat.
nodes.notes: Evolution has had millions of years to refine this form

nodes.name: The Final Ward
nodes.effect: Unlock: permanently negate all Vorax consumption effects on any planet with a Core Guardian structure. Planets cannot be consumed while Guardians stand.
